message: src/dashboard/no_header.cpp has no matching header src/dashboard/no_header.h; add one or allowlist the translation unit.
Function body for HeaderBodyViolation appears in a header; move non-template logic to a matching .cpp file.
MismatchedFunction is declared from src/dashboard/mismatch_decl.h but implemented in src/dashboard/wrong_place.cpp; expected src/dashboard/mismatch_decl.cpp.
Package dependency graph is not a DAG; cycle detected among: config, dashboard, renderer, util.
dashboard/violations depends on package-private module config/private/secret; only src/config/ files may include modules below src/config/*/.
dashboard/violations must not depend on Direct2D/DirectWrite/WIC/WRL module d2d; only renderer may.

dashboard/violations is in the dashboard package and must depend only on dashboard, config, diagnostics, display, layout_edit, layout_edit_dialog, layout_model, telemetry, util, or widget modules, not project module renderer/render.
renderer/render is in the renderer package and must depend only on renderer, config, or util modules, not project module dashboard/violations.
Project header "../util/include_style_target.h" resolves to src/util/include_style_target.h; use "util/include_style_target.h" from the src include root instead of a relative or local shorthand path.
Local NOLINT suppressions are not allowed; fix the finding or add a maintained checker-level exception instead.

std::filesystem is not allowed in maintained source; use src/util/file_path.* helpers so path handling stays Win32-backed without pulling filesystem machinery into the app. See docs/source_policy_guardrails.md.

wide literals must stay narrow UTF-8 by default; only const wchar_t string constants initialized with L"..." and an end-of-line reason comment are allowed for wide-native boundaries with no A-style API. See docs/source_policy_guardrails.md.

STL threading primitives are not allowed in maintained source; use LightweightMutex for small locks and direct Win32 thread or event handles for worker wakeups so prior size-optimization wins stay enforced. See docs/source_policy_guardrails.md.

std::function is not allowed in maintained source; use FunctionRef for synchronous borrowed callbacks or a purpose-built interface when ownership must escape the call. See docs/source_policy_guardrails.md.

std::hash is not allowed in maintained source; use a concrete project-owned hash helper for fixed lookup tables so small caches do not grow broad STL hashing machinery. See docs/source_policy_guardrails.md.

conditional compilation guards are not allowed in maintained source; keep code compiled for every native target and let the linker remove unreferenced target-specific helpers. See docs/source_policy_guardrails.md.

MessageBoxW is not allowed in maintained source; CaseDash declares UTF-8 as the process code page and calls Win32 A APIs by default. Keep W calls only for documented wide-native APIs that have no A-style boundary. See docs/source_policy_guardrails.md.
obsolete conversion-only Utf8 helper names are not allowed; UTF-8 is the app default, so call A APIs directly or use no-suffix app helpers. See docs/source_policy_guardrails.md.
